Correct

The value 0.615 is clearly visible on the LCD display in the primary crop. Structured verifier confirmed the same reading. Final read remained partially ambiguous after verification; returning the best-supported value.
Mismatch

Pre Weight Sample 3

Line 1 - Moisture Test

Submission: IEU85402528

Created At: 14-03-2026 05:04 PM

Time Slot: 3 PM - 5 PM

Open image Open original Clappia link
Expected
18.850
System Output
0.850
System Status
ok
Confidence
0.95
Initial Match Status
mismatch
Final Status
mismatch
Review Status
Reviewed Value
Review Note
Reason
Structured verifier: The display clearly shows '8.50'. The first two '8's are dim placeholder segments and not active digits. The proposed '88.50' is incorrect as it implies two active '8's before the decimal point. Consensus override: structured verifier replaced the weaker primary read. Applied the fixed 3-decimal contract for this target.
Mismatch
